photo.title: Matsue Castle (15119129136)
photo.description: From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia The keep of the Castle Ninomaru Ruins of the Ote gate Matsue Castle (松江城 Matsue-jō?) is a feudal castle in Matsue in Shimane prefecture, Japan. Nicknamed the "black castle" or "plover castle", it is one of the few remaining medieval castles in Japan – at least of the few remaining in their original wooden form, and not a modern reconstruction in concrete. The construction of Matsue Castle began in 1607 and finished in 1611, under the local lord Horio Yoshiharu. In 1638, the fief and castle passed to the Matsudaira clan, a junior branch of the ruling Tokugawa clan. Most Japanese castles have been damaged or destroyed by war, earthquakes, or other causes. Since a large part of their construction was wooden, fire was a major hazard. Matsue castle was built after the last great war of feudal Japan, so it never saw a battle. Yet only some of the walls and the keep exist today.

photo.title: Flying Black-headed Gull (5253245714)
photo.description: I went to Mizumoto park, Tokyo. There were a lot of bird there and nice place to practice my panning shot. I took 969 panning shots of birds and this one is the best. I realized that I have to slow shatter speed down to make moving subject is really moving especially when background is not well focused. 1/50s in 400mm lens is challenging but it worth trying it! 水元公園に行って流し撮りの練習をしてきました。鳥さんがたくさんいて、流し撮りの練習をするには最適な場所です。969枚の流し撮りをしましたが、これがベストな1枚です。 背景がボケているときは、シャッタースピードを落とさないとスピード感が出ないようなので、400mmのレンズで1/50秒のシャッタースピードにチャレンジした作品です。ちなみにノートリミングです。 Canon EOS 7D + Canon EF 400mm F5.6L USM

photo.title: 斜陽とベンチ Spotlit Bench (8204872801)
photo.description: 2012年11月7日、長野県上田市にある上田城跡公園にて。 私はマジックアワー、もしくはゴールデンアワーと言われる時間帯によく写真を取ります。人によって様々な解釈があるようですが、太陽が地平線に沈む少し前から沈んでから空が暗くなるなるまでの時間帯と、その反対の太陽が地平線から昇る前後の時間帯です。 この時間帯はこのベンチの写真のように影が伸び黄色がかった写真が撮れ、なんでもない光景でもとても良い雰囲気の写真になります。 11/07/2012, a bench in Uedajyo-Castle Remains in Nagano, Japan. I love taking pictures in so-called magic hour or golden hour. People have different specific definitions for them, but I define them as time periods between a little before and after sunset, and also those of sunrise. In one of the times you can see things with longer shadows and yellowish. Those effects make everyday places look a bit prettier.

photo.title: Milky Way - Lake Yunoko - Nikko, Tochigi - Japan - 28 Sept. 2013
photo.description: Lake Yunoko is located Nikko, and is really nice place to photograph stars. I was impressed what I saw there. I was impressed the greatest lens for taking stars. I can take stars with ISO 3200 if you setup exposure wide opened. By the way you see some lights over there - it is a villege near Lake Yunoko. I'm staying a hotel at the villege. 湯ノ湖は奥日光に位置する湖で、星を撮影するのにとても良い場所です。星空を見上げたときには「おおおお〜」と思わずうなってしまいました。そして星空を撮るのに最高のレンズ14-24mm f/2.8の性能にも思わずうなってしまいました。解放にするとISO 3200でバッチリ撮れました。 ちなみに湖の向こう側に見える光は湯元温泉という温泉を売りにしたホテルがたくさん並んでる場所です。 [ Nikon D4, Nikon AF-S NIKKOR 14-24mm f/2.8G ED, 14mm, f/2.8, 30sec, ISO3200, Tripod, Lightroom 5 ]
